title: Ukrainian Lamb Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful stew made with tender lamb, smoky spices, and vegetables. Perfect for a cold winter night.

ingredients.name: Carrots
ingredients.notes: Peel and chop into bite-sized pieces

ingredients.name: Potatoes
ingredients.notes: Peel and chop into bite-sized pieces

ingredients.name: Ukrainian stew spice blend
ingredients.notes: Available at most Eastern European grocery stores

ingredients.name: Red wine
ingredients.notes: Optional, but adds depth of flavor

ingredients.name: Water
ingredients.notes: Add more as needed to achieve desired consistency

instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add lamb cubes and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes. Remove from pot and set aside.
Add more oil if necessary, then sauté onions until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add carrots and potatoes, cook for an additional 5 minutes.
Add Ukrainian stew spice blend and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add tomato paste and red wine (if using), stir to combine.
Return lamb to pot, add water, and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 2-3 hours, or until lamb is tender.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh dill if desired.
